message:
fix(demo_showcase): disable non-blocking stdin to fix macOS PTY issues

On macOS, setting stdin to non-blocking mode on a PTY affects stdout too,
causing `WouldBlock` errors on writes. Since we use `select()` for timeout
handling, non-blocking stdin is unnecessary - `select()` tells us when data
is available, and a blocking read succeeds immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
